text: Dealix logistics intelligence covers freight routing, fleet utilisation and last-mile delivery performance for distribution companies operating warehouses across the Kingdom.
The retail growth playbook tracks store footfall, merchandising mix and basket size for retail chains expanding into shopping malls and high-street locations.
Finance operations reporting consolidates monthly revenue, cost controls and treasury cash position so finance teams can close the books with audit-ready statements.
Compliance and governance review enforces PDPL lawful basis, consent records and data-retention policy before any personal data is processed or exported.
Talent and hiring signals monitor job postings, headcount growth and recruiter activity to flag companies scaling their engineering and sales organisations.
